channel.title: Cong Le Apps Blog
channel.description: Guides, tips, and updates from the apps built by Cong Le.

item.title: What Is the Best Time to Fish Today?
item.description: Find the best time to fish today using major and minor feeding windows, moon position, and a simple daily rating anglers actually trust.

item.title: How to Chat with Ollama from Your iPhone
item.description: Set up an Ollama iPhone client in minutes: run Ollama on your Mac or PC, expose it on your network, and chat with your local models on the go.

item.title: How to Lock Your iPhone Screen for a Baby
item.description: Learn how to lock your iPhone screen for a baby using Guided Access, plus a faster app-based alternative that keeps little fingers from causing chaos.
